headline: Assessing Globe Life (GL) Valuation After Dividend Hike And Insider Share Sale
summary: Globe Life (GL) has drawn fresh attention after its Board approved a higher quarterly dividend of $0.3300 per share, alongside significant insider selling and recent analyst commentary that together are shaping the stock’s current discussion. See our latest analysis for Globe Life. The latest dividend increase and insider sale come after a steady period for Globe Life, with a 90 day share price return of 10.6% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 17.5%.
